description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a sleek, pointed nose and a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a dark, tinted canopy. The aircraft has four prominent engines mounted on the wings, two on each side, with cylindrical exhausts extending rearward. Its wings are straight and extend outward with a slight dihedral angle, each equipped with long, thin laser-like cannons at the tips. The landing gear consists of three visible struts, two under the wings and one under the nose, each ending in a small footpad. The body is primarily a matte gray color, with black accents on the engines, landing gear, and weaponry, giving it a high-tech, combat-ready appearance.
description: A sleek, gray futuristic airplane with four engines, straight wings, and a forward cockpit. It features prominent wingtip cannons and black landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and symmetrical arrangement of four engines and wingtip cannons.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, straight wings, and the alignment of the engines and landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the engine exhausts, the back of the cockpit, and the symmetry of the wings and cannons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same wing, engine, and landing gear configuration from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, slight dihedral angle, and long wingtip extensions for mounted cannons.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines, two mounted on each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear under the wings and a single nose gear, all fixed and exposed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat configuration and a dark, angular canopy.
